seo.title: Grand Pavilion 大观楼 — Authentic Cantonese Restaurant Flushing NY
seo.description: Authentic Cantonese cuisine with 80+ dim sum varieties daily. Reserve your table in Flushing's premier Chinese dining destination.

hero.headline: The Art of Cantonese Tradition
hero.imageAlt: Grand Pavilion dining room with traditional Chinese décor
hero.subheadline: Authentic dim sum & Cantonese cuisine · Flushing, New York · Est. 1998
hero.subheadlineZh: 正宗点心及粤菜 · 纽约法拉盛 · 创立于1998年

chef_hero.bio: Trained in the kitchens of Hong Kong's finest Cantonese restaurants, Chef Li Wei has spent over 25 years perfecting the art of dim sum and classic Cantonese cuisine. His devotion to traditional techniques — combined with an unwavering commitment to seasonal, premium ingredients — has made Grand Pavilion the premier Chinese dining destination in Flushing.
chef_hero.heading: Chef Li Wei

announcement.text: Now accepting reservations for Chinese New Year 2027 banquet dinners.
announcement.textZh: 现已开放2027年农历新年宴席预订。

categories.name: Dim Sum
categories.descriptionZh: 每日80余种点心，上午10时至下午3时

categories.name: Cantonese Dinner
categories.description: Classic dishes, whole seafood, roasted meats
categories.descriptionZh: 经典菜式，鲜活海鲜，烧味拼盘

categories.name: Weekend Brunch
categories.descriptionZh: 周末从早9时30分起，点心品种更丰富

items.name: Michael Chen
items.text: The best dim sum in Flushing, hands down. The har gow here is worth the trip from Manhattan.

items.name: Sarah Liu
items.text: We hosted our daughter's wedding banquet here for 300 guests. The service was flawless and the food was incredible.

items.name: 王先生
items.text: 每次来都是享受，点心品质一流，服务周到，是法拉盛最正宗的粤菜。
items.textZh: 每次来都是享受，点心品质一流，服务周到，是法拉盛最正宗的粤菜。

items.name: Jennifer Park
items.text: Chef Li Wei's Peking Duck is the most authentic I've had outside of Beijing. Absolutely stunning.

items.name: 陈太太
items.text: 在这里庆祝了父母的金婚纪念日，私人宴厅布置精美，菜肴用心，全家人都非常满意。
items.textZh: 在这里庆祝了父母的金婚纪念日，私人宴厅布置精美，菜肴用心，全家人都非常满意。

dim_sum_status.closedTextZh: 点心从上午10时开始供应
dim_sum_status.weekendTextZh: 周末早午餐从早9时30分开始

items.name: Har Gow
items.description: Crystal-skin prawn dumplings, steamed to order

items.name: Peking Duck
items.description: Whole roasted duck, carved tableside with pancakes

items.name: Char Siu Bao
items.description: Soft steamed buns with honey-glazed BBQ pork

today_specials.heading: Today's Specials
today_specials.subheading: Freshly prepared by our kitchen team
today_specials.subheadingZh: 由我们的厨师团队精心制作

reservations_cta.heading: Reserve Your Table
reservations_cta.subheading: Join us for dim sum, dinner, or a special celebration.
reservations_cta.subheadingZh: 欢迎前来享用点心、晚餐或特别庆典。

festival_highlight.fallbackText: Celebrate Chinese holidays with us — special menus for Chinese New Year, Mid-Autumn Festival, and more.
festival_highlight.fallbackTextZh: 与我们共庆中国传统节日——农历新年、中秋节等节庆特别菜单。

private_dining_cta.heading: Hosting an Event?
private_dining_cta.subheading: Banquet dining for 10 to 500 guests. Wedding banquets, corporate events, birthday celebrations.
private_dining_cta.subheadingZh: 可容纳10至500位宾客的宴席。婚宴、企业活动、生日庆典一应俱全。
